specific_question: How would a new AI-integrated  ITSM change Mediconn Solutions' ticketing workflow in 2026?
answer: The IT department launched a test of a priority-level AI tagging system in July of 2025. The test proved that using AI could speed up ticket traffic issue resolution by 40%.
